message:
test(search-core): add 28 tests for query cache infrastructure

Expand cache.rs from 17 to 45 tests covering:
- Disabled cache: get always returns None, put is noop
- TTL expiry: CacheEntry::is_expired, zero-TTL immediate expiry
- Epoch management: bump_epoch, put rejects stale epoch
- Hit rate calculation: empty, 100%, 50%
- Prune expired: fresh entries survive non-zero TTL
- Invalidate_all: clears entries, bumps epoch, records evictions
- WarmWorker: is_fully_warm lifecycle (empty, warming, complete,
  failed), all_status count, config defaults
- Invalidator: max_events enforcement, trigger tracking, epoch
  increments per invalidation
- QueryCacheKey: without_filter zero hash, offset/limit
  differentiation, serde roundtrip
- Filter hash: empty filter consistency, field differentiation
- CacheConfig defaults, CacheEntry::touch, serde roundtrips for
  WarmState/WarmResource/InvalidationTrigger
- Duplicate key update replaces value without duplicating entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
